Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Now that we're good and stuffed, how 'bout we take a picture together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Actually, I did try to take one last night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}'Cept I forgot it doesn't work during the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You mean you brought a camera with you to the battle?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Well, yeah. I mean, it was our last battle and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}'Scuse me, mister! You mind takin' our picture?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Ugh, I feel like such a tourist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}But y'know, I do kinda want a picture, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh, wait. Ikutsuki-san and Aigis aren't here. I guess we'll have to take another one later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Alright, everyone get together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}C'mon, squeeze in tight! Everyone get real close to me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Ah, geez, don't make the poor camera guy wait all day![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Hey, we're good to go. You can take the picture whenever![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Hey, get your hand outta my face![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Is it just me, or did this not get my good side?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}We'll just take another one when Aigis and Ikutsuki-san get back, alright!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I could really get used to this worry-free lifestyle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}How about you, Koro-chan? Are you excited for all this meat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The celebration party continues...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a moment of relaxation[n]with my battle-weary friends...[n]{f 1 1}
